title: Netherite Ingot Armor
description: Craft new powerful armor using netherite ingots.
body:
Adds the option to craft armor out of netherite ingots. The armor has (for the most part) 9x better stats than regular netherite armor. Great for any modded survival worlds. Pretty OP but hard to get all the netherite so feels like more of a reward than a cheat code.

Notes: Same textures as regular netherite armor, not all stats could be multiplied by 9 - these were simply set to the max stat (lower than 9x)
